entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was extracted successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the path between the specified distances and writes it into the path builder.

params.stop: The distance along the path at which to end the segment.
params.start: The distance along the path at which to begin the segment.
params.dst: The path builder to receive the extracted segment.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to begin the segment with a move-to command; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
